summary: Completed comprehensive testing of date-wise stock movement ledger reports for all 3 product types. Backend APIs 100% working (17/17 tests passed). Frontend UI correctly displays expandable ledger rows with Opening/In/Out/Closing for Semi-Finished, Finished, and Raw Material products. Date range filtering works on all pages. Pack/History/Dispatch forms all functional.
passed_tests: Login with admin/admin123
Semi-Finished Products page: Shows expandable product rows with Opening/In/Out/Closing
Semi-Finished Products page: Click to expand shows date-wise ledger (Production IN, Packing OUT)
Semi-Finished Products page: Date range filter works (Apply/Reset)
Semi-Finished Products page: Pack button opens packing form with SKU dropdown
Semi-Finished Products page: History button shows packing history modal
Semi-Finished Products page: Export Excel button visible
Finished Products & Dispatch page: Shows expandable SKU rows with Opening/Packed/Dispatched/Closing
Finished Products & Dispatch page: Click to expand shows date-wise ledger (Packing IN, Dispatch OUT)
Finished Products & Dispatch page: Date range filter works
Finished Products & Dispatch page: Create Dispatch form uses SKU dropdown
Finished Products & Dispatch page: Recent Dispatches table visible
Raw Material Stock page: Shows expandable material rows with Opening/Purchased/Used/Closing
Raw Material Stock page: Click to expand shows date-wise ledger (Purchase IN, Batch Usage OUT)
Raw Material Stock page: Material filter and date range filter work
Raw Material Stock page: Add Purchase button opens form with material dropdown
Backend API: GET /api/reports/semi-finished-ledger returns ledger data with transactions
Backend API: GET /api/reports/finished-ledger returns ledger data with transactions
Backend API: GET /api/reports/raw-material-ledger returns ledger data with transactions
Backend API: Date range filtering on all 3 ledger endpoints
Backend API: Material filter on raw-material-ledger endpoint
Backend API: Ledger calculations (closing = opening + in - out) verified
Backend API: Running balance accuracy verified
Navigation between all pages works
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test data from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Date-wise stock movement ledger feature fully tested and working. Key endpoints: /api/reports/semi-finished-ledger (Production IN, Packing OUT), /api/reports/finished-ledger (Packing IN, Dispatch OUT), /api/reports/raw-material-ledger (Purchase IN, Batch Usage OUT). All support start_date and end_date query params. Raw material ledger also supports material filter. Opening stock is calculated from transactions before start_date. UI shows expandable rows per product/SKU/material with transaction details table.
